member.name: M:AIKernel.Tools.Inspectors.ChatHistoryScraper.Export.MdExporter.ToMarkdown
member.summary: Executes the ToMarkdown operation as part of the AIKernel public reference surface.

member.name: M:AIKernel.Tools.Inspectors.ChatHistoryScraper.Export.RomExporter.ToRom
member.summary: Executes the ToRom operation as part of the AIKernel public reference surface.

member.name: M:AIKernel.Tools.Inspectors.ChatHistoryScraper.Export.RomExporter.ToRomWithMetadata
member.summary: Exports chat history records into deterministic HistoryROM markdown using the supplied namespace, name, and optional generation timestamp.

member.name: T:AIKernel.Tools.Inspectors.ChatHistoryScraper.Export.MdExporter
member.summary: Represents the MdExporter public reference surface for AIKernel package consumers.

member.name: T:AIKernel.Tools.Inspectors.ChatHistoryScraper.Export.RomExporter
member.summary: Represents the RomExporter public reference surface for AIKernel package consumers.
